name: Couple or Not
overview: Gui Ming wakes up in a parallel ABO world as an Omega, pregnant and married to his Alpha's mortal enemy. As he adjusts to this surreal new life, he’s drawn into a complex mix of emotions, conflict, and unexpected romance during the ten months of his pregnancy.

trailers.title: First omegaverse drama! [Couple or Not][OFFICE TRAILER] #coupleornot #omegaverse #blseries #drama
